submissions.name: Star Counter Game
submissions.text: A simple click game that teaches counting while collecting glowing stars in space.
submissions.author: E2E Test
submissions.prompt: Build a tiny star-collecting game where kids click glowing stars and learn counting from 1 to 10.

submissions.name: Rainbow Calculator
submissions.text: A fun calculator where every button is a different color and makes a happy sound when pressed.
submissions.prompt: Build a colorful calculator web app for kids ages 6-10. Each number button should be a bright rainbow color. When a button is pressed, play a short cheerful tone. Show the equation and answer in large friendly text. Keep it simple, safe, and fun.
submissions.author: Weekend Builds
Shaz
